ggpop 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Guides
    • GWAS plots

    • Admixture plots

    • Discrete color schemes
    • Full extdata gallery
    • Compatibility and advanced helpers

Package index

Core Data Workflows

Import typed data and start tidy ggplot workflows.

ggpop()
Create a ggplot object from ggpop data
import_gwas() improt_gwas() prot_gwas()
Import GWAS result files
import_pca() compute_pca()
Import or compute PCA results
import_pop_group()
Import population group labels
import_admixture() import_admix()
Import admixture proportion files

GWAS Plots

Manhattan and Q-Q plots for GCTA, GEMMA, and EMMAX results.

plot_manha()
Publication-oriented Manhattan plots
geom_manha()
Manhattan plot layer
plot_qq()
Publication-oriented GWAS Q-Q plots
geom_qq()
Q-Q plot layer for GWAS p-values

PCA Plots

PLINK/GCTA imports and optional flashpcaR computation.

plot_pca()
Publication-oriented PCA plots
geom_pca()
PCA scatter layer
import_pca() compute_pca()
Import or compute PCA results

Admixture Plots

Narrow user-facing admixture plotting API.

plot_admix() as_pophelper_qlist() plot_admixture_pophelper()
Publication-oriented admixture plots
geom_admix()
Admixture barplot layer

Population Genomics Statistics

Windowed FST, pi, Tajima’s D, and related statistics from pixy or vcftools.

import_stats()
Import population genomics summary statistics
geom_stats() plot_stats()
Population genomics statistics plots

Styling

Shared palettes, scales, and publication theme helpers.

new_pop_palette() ggpop_palette() scale_colour_ggpop() scale_color_ggpop() scale_fill_ggpop()
Discrete ggpop population palettes
theme_ggpop_publication() ggpop_palette() scale_fill_ggpop() scale_colour_ggpop()
Publication-oriented ggpop styles
theme_tidyplot() theme_ggplot2() theme_minimal_xy() theme_minimal_x() theme_minimal_y() style_void()
ggpop theme helpers
adjust_font()
Adjust ggpop font settings

Advanced Compatibility

Exported integration hooks and original-package compatibility layers.

plot_admix() as_pophelper_qlist() plot_admixture_pophelper()
Publication-oriented admixture plots
pophelper_functions() pophelper_call() import_pophelper_qlist() pophelper_as_qlist() pophelper_is_qlist() read_pophelper_q() plot_pophelper_q() plot_pophelper_q_multiline() align_pophelper_k() sort_pophelper_q() split_pophelper_q() merge_pophelper_q() join_pophelper_q() tabulate_pophelper_q() summarise_pophelper_q() analyse_pophelper_q() evanno_pophelper_structure() pophelper_distruct_colours() pophelper_verify_grplab()
pophelper compatibility layer

On this page

Developed by ggpop Authors.
